channel.title: jb-marketplace-plugins-jetbrains
channel.description: The latest JetBrains plugins on the JetBrains marketplace
channel.dc:creator: Jonathan Lermitage

item.title: kmp-buddy - Sat Apr 04 04:33:38 UTC 2026
item.description:
KMP Buddy for JetBrains IDEs combines Compose refactoring, Compose Blocks, and canvas-based layout authoring in one plugin. What This Plugin Does kmp-aio is a Kotlin...
vendor: zjarlin downloads: 1 pricingModel: FREE xmlId: site.addzero.kmp-buddy

item.title: I18n Navigator - Fri Apr 03 19:15:15 UTC 2026
item.description:

item.title: Notification Bridge - Fri Apr 03 18:48:37 UTC 2026
item.description:

item.title: Swag - Fri Apr 03 18:19:21 UTC 2026
item.description:

item.title: AgentellIJ - Sat Apr 04 04:37:13 UTC 2026

item.title: branch-diff-gutter - Fri Apr 03 17:09:38 UTC 2026
item.description:
Highlights differences between the current working tree and a configurable base branch (e.g., main or master) directly in the editor gutter.
vendor: Cawserve downloads: 1 pricingModel: FREE xmlId: com.github.chriswatts91.branchdiffgutter

item.description:
